## Checklist

- [ ] User-facing strings are in `lang/en/local_chemillusion.php` (English only)
- [ ] PHP files include GPL header and `@package local_chemillusion`
- [ ] External integrations remain optional and admin-configurable
- [ ] Privacy API updated if new data is stored or sent externally (`classes/privacy/provider.php`, `docs/privacy-and-data-flow.md`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where practical (PHPUnit / Behat)
- [ ] No credentials, private URLs, or ChemIllusion proprietary internals included
